Notice Of Motion For Protective Order And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gerad D. Launay for defendant and moving party: Yee Gin Lee

NO OTHER APPEARANCE WAS STATED. AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Yee Lee's motion for a protective order is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Plaintiff Shook Wah Chan'S Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents (Set #1) As To Defendant Amber Lee
Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Shook Wah Chan's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents (set #1) as to defendant Amber Lee.
The motion is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 3.1113. The motion does not have any evidence of the discovery requests alleged to be at issue. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.

Plaintiff's motion to produce an accounting.
The motion is denied without prejudice to be filed in the appropriate department of this Court.

Plaintiff's motion for contempt is Denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Chan Wah Shook plaintiff and moving party in propria persona
Peter H. Bresler for defendant and opposing party: Yee Gin Lee

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Chan Shook's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $40 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Inspection Demands, And Request For Admissions Which Were Separately Served By Ind. Defts Trustee Yee Gin Lee, Vivienne Lee, And Amber Lee; And/Or For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Yee Gin Lee's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, requests for admissions and request for production of documents.
2) Defendant Vivienne Lee's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, requests for admissions and request for production of documents.
3) Defendant Amber Lee's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, requests for admissions and request for production of documents.

Granted. As plaintiff's joint answers were unverified, Plaintiff has not responded. Plaintiff is ordered to individually respond, without objection, within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
